canonical_value: Question: As shown in the image, a rectangular region contains a uniform and steady magnetic field. A semicircular closed wire loop rotates counterclockwise with constant angular velocity around axis \( O \) in the plane of the paper. The point \( O \) is the center of the semicircle and is located exactly at the edge of the magnetic field. Time measurement starts when the semicircular loop is completely outside the magnetic field. Among the graphs (A)-(D), which \( -t \) function graph corresponds to the induced electromotive force generated in the semicircular wire loop?

canonical_value:
Question: The figure shows the single line diagram of a single machine infinite bus system.

The inertia constant of the synchronous generator \( H = 5 \ \text{MW-s/MVA} \). Frequency is 50 Hz. Mechanical power is 1 pu. The system is operating at the stable equilibrium point with rotor angle \( \delta \) equal to \( 30^\circ \). A three-phase short circuit fault occurs at a certain location on one of the circuits of the double circuit transmission line. During fault, electrical power in pu is \( P_{\text{max}} \sin \delta \). If the values of \( \delta \) and \( \frac{d\delta}{dt} \) at the instant of fault clearing are \( 45^\circ \) and 3.762 radian/s respectively, then \( P_{\text{max}} \) (in pu) is ______.
请只回答第 1 个目标量。

canonical_value: Question: An abrupt \( pn \) junction (located at \( x=0 \)) is uniformly doped on both \( p \) and \( n \) sides.

normalized_value.text: Question: An abrupt \( pn \) junction (located at \( x=0 \)) is uniformly doped on both \( p \) and \( n \) sides.

canonical_value: Which of the following figures represents the electric field profile near the \( pn \) junction?
surface_forms: Which of the following figures represents the electric field profile near the \( pn \) junction?

normalized_value.target_text: Which of the following figures represents the electric field profile near the \( pn \) junction?

canonical_value: Question: An abrupt \( pn \) junction (located at \( x=0 \)) is uniformly doped on both \( p \) and \( n \) sides. The width of the depletion region is \( W \), and the electric field variation in the \( x \) direction is \( E(x) \). Which of the following figures represents the electric field profile near the \( pn \) junction?
surface_forms: Question: An abrupt \( pn \) junction (located at \( x=0 \)) is uniformly doped on both \( p \) and \( n \) sides. The width of the depletion region is \( W \), and the electric field variation in the \( x \) direction is \( E(x) \). Which of the following figures represents the electric field profile near the \( pn \) junction?
